infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VoltGo needs camera access to take delivery proof photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VoltGo needs photo library access to upload your ID and profile photo.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VoltGo needs your location to show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: VoltGo needs your location while delivering to track your route.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: VoltGo uses Face ID to sign you in quickly.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VoltGo may need microphone access during camera use.
